scripts.remotion:render:v6: npx remotion render src/remotion/index.ts TutifyDemoV6 out/TutifyDemoV6.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p --crf 18
scripts.remotion:render: npx remotion render src/remotion/index.ts TutifyDemo out/tutify-demo.mp4
scripts.remotion:render:hq: npx remotion render src/remotion/index.ts TutifyDemo out/tutify-demo-hq.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p --crf 18
scripts.remotion:render:scene1: npx remotion render src/remotion/index.ts TeachingIntro out/scene-01-teaching-intro.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p --crf 18
scripts.remotion:render:scene2: npx remotion render src/remotion/index.ts EducationChangingSlide out/scene-02-education-changing.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p --crf 18
scripts.remotion:render:scene3: npx remotion render src/remotion/index.ts TeachersOverwhelmedSlide out/scene-03-teachers-overwhelmed.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p --crf 18
scripts.remotion:render:scenes123: yarn remotion:render:scene1 && yarn remotion:render:scene2 && yarn remotion:render:scene3
scripts.remotion:render:scenes123-combined: npx remotion render src/remotion/index.ts TutifyScenes123 out/scenes-1-2-3-combined.mp4 --codec h264 --pixel-format yuv420p --crf 18
